title: Dog Rubber Rope Man Dog Chew Toy. Colourful and Tug Toy, Dental Health, Durable Ropes, Rubber Head, Dental Cleaning, All Breeds, Puppies, Small, Medium, Large. 3 Colours (Grey)
features: {DURABLE CONSTRUCTION} Each tug rope man toy, with knotted rope, and a rubber mans head, with a design that ensures durability, perfect for aggressive chewers and regular play
{DENTAL BENEFITS} These material ropes and rubber heads help reduce plaque and tartar build-up on your pet dogs teeth whilst massaging gums and strengthening jaw muscles during play and exercise
{VERSATILE PLAY} Ideal for interactive tug-of-war games, playing fetch, duo, pack and solo chewing activities to prevent boredom and encourage exercise for your pet dogs. 3 colour choices available.
{MULTI PLAY ITEMS} These tug toys include material rope in vibrant colour combinations of blue, orange, and grey designs to catch the attention of your pet dog, and a rubber head.
{SIZE AND MATERIAL} With three colours to choose from, each 41cm in length, each crafted from durable rope with knots and rubber material from the ball head, suitable for all dog breeds and sizes.
description: Product Description Colourful Rubber Rope Man Chew and Tug Toy. Keep your furry friend entertained and their teeth clean with this vibrant rope and rubber toy. Each toy features a material rope, and TPR Rubber head , crafted from durable rope material in eye-catching colour combinations. Perfect for dogs of all breeds and sizes. Rope Toys Are Excellent For Dogs, They Offer A Combination Of Physical, Mental, And Dental Benefits: Dental Health Dental Health : The fibrous texture of rope toys acts like floss, helping to clean your dog's teeth and reduce plaque build up as they chew. This can contribute to fresher breath and healthier gums. Mental Stimulation Mental Stimulation : Chewing and playing with rope toys keeps dogs mentally engaged, satisfying their natural instincts and reducing boredom or anxiety. Physical Exercise Physical Exercise : Rope toys are versatile and can be used for games like tug-of-war or fetch, promoting physical activity and strengthening muscles. Rope toys are designed to withstand vigorous chewing, making them a long-lasting option for dogs who love to gnaw Interactive play with rope toys fosters a stronger connection between you and your dog. Interactive play with rope toys enhances trust and communication. Always supervise your dog while they play with rope toys to ensure safety. Rubber Rope Man Toy, Colourful Chew and Tug Toy for Dental Cleaning for All Breeds Colourful Material Rope with TPR Rubber Man Head DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Material rope design and TPR Rubber ensures long-lasting durability, perfect for aggressive chewers and regular play sessions DENTAL BENEFITS: Textured material rope and TPR rubber helps reduce plaque and tartar build-up whilst massaging gums and strengthening jaw muscles during play VERSATILE PLAY: Ideal for interactive tug-of-war games, fetch, and solo chewing activities to prevent boredom and encourage exercise VARIETY OF COLOURS: Each colour choice has material ropes in vibrant combinations of blue, orange, and pink grey designs SIZE AND MATERIAL: Each rope toy features a human design along its length, crafted from durable rope material and TPR rubber head, suitable for all dog breeds Rubber Rope Man Dog Tug and Chew Toy. Dog Braided Rope Toys. Dog Braided Rope Set of 2 Rope Toys. Squeaky Rubber Rope And Rugby Ball Dog Toy. Dogs Knotted Rope Man Chew and Tug Toy.
